author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
tuhu̐ dayā⋅sāgara tārayite prāṇī
nāma aneka tuyā śikhāoli āni

sakala śakati dei nāme tohārā
grahaṇe rākhali nāhi kāla⋅vicārā

śrī⋅nāmacintāmaṇi tohāri samānā
viśve vilāoli karuṇā⋅nidānā

tuyā dayā aichana parama udārā
atiśaya manda nātha! bhāga hāmārā

nāhi janamala nāme anurāga mora
bhakativinoda⋅citta duḥkhe vibhora
en_translation:
You are an ocean of mercy, to deliver living beings. You have brought and taught us many of Your holy names.

You have invested all power in Your holy name. In chanting it, You have kept no consideration of time or rules.

Your wish-fulfilling jewel of the holy name is equal to You. You have distributed this source of mercy throughout the world.

Your mercy is so supremely magnanimous. O Lord! My fortune is extremely wretched.

No love for the holy name has developed in me. Bhakativinoda's heart is overwhelmed with sorrow.
